notes: Prefers female doctor for consultations

Loyal patient since 2015. Always punctual. Prefers morning appointments. Has mobility issues - allow extra time. Relies on Eastwood community bus — only runs Tues/Thurs mornings, arrives clinic ~9:30am. Son drives her on other days but works until 3pm.

Asthma — 3-monthly cycle: spirometry test → review with Dr Chen (1 week later) → adjust preventer if needed. Also gets annual flu vaccine in March. Action plan on file — step-up protocol if peak flow drops below 80%.
University student. Eligible for bulk billing with concession card.
Tends to forget appointments. Has missed 3 previous bookings. Please send extra reminders day before AND morning of appointment.
Pregnant - currently 28 weeks. Regular antenatal check-ups with Dr Nguyen.

Type 2 diabetes — quarterly cycle: fasting blood test (Mon/Tue morning, must be fasting) → results review with Dr Chen 1 week later → dietitian referral if HbA1c elevated. On metformin 1000mg twice daily. Wife Maria manages his diet and usually calls with questions about results.

Hypertension — fortnightly BP check with nurse, monthly review with Dr Chen. On ramipril 5mg + amlodipine 5mg. If BP stable for 3 consecutive months, can move to monthly checks only. Keeps a home BP diary — bring to each appointment.

Recovering from hip replacement surgery (Feb 2026). Needs gentle handling. Korean-speaking — limited English for medical terminology. Daughter Jenny Park (0433 111 222) interprets for all consultations and manages all bookings. Call Jenny first to arrange appointments, not Mrs Park directly. Prefers to be called Mrs Park.
Prefers female doctor. Interpreter may be needed for complex discussions.
Chronic back pain. Referral to physiotherapist on file.
Anxiety management plan in place. Review every 6 weeks.
Hard of hearing. Speak clearly and loudly. Wears hearing aid in left ear.

Outstanding payment dispute - says he was overcharged for consultation on 2026-02-17. Claims he should have been bulk-billed. Prefers to be contacted by phone only. Has said he will pay remaining balance on Friday.
Thyroid condition. Annual blood work due in April.
Parent/guardian: Jenny Walsh. 6 year old. Up to date on vaccinations. Shy with new people.
Menopause management. Currently on HRT. Review with Dr Nguyen.
Sports injury - knee. Referred to orthopaedic specialist.
Parent/guardian: Wei Zhang (father) and Mei Zhang (mother). 4 year old. Paediatric patient of Dr Kim. Allergic to penicillin.
Cholesterol management. On statins. Annual liver function test needed.
New patient. Transferred from practice in Melbourne. Medical records requested.
Parent/guardian: Kate Stewart. 9 year old. ADHD management plan. Regular reviews with Dr Kim.

85 years old. Home visit may be required for future appointments. No email - phone contact only. Hard of hearing — speak slowly and clearly. Daughter Helen Clarke (0412 999 888) manages all bookings and accompanies to every appointment. Patient cannot attend alone. Helen prefers to be called the day before to confirm.
Skin condition - eczema. Regular scripts needed.
Trying to conceive. Referral to fertility specialist on file.
Work-related stress. On mental health care plan. Sees psychologist fortnightly.
Parent/guardian: Sam Campbell. 5 year old. Due for school entry vaccinations.
Sleep apnoea. Uses CPAP machine. Annual review needed.

Parent: Sarah Mitchell (mum, 0412 334 556) handles all appointments and medical decisions. Father David Mitchell (0421 887 334) manages billing and insurance claims. Sarah works Mon-Wed so David brings Noah those days. Paediatric patient of Dr Kim. Recurring ear infections — ENT referral pending.

Parent: Sarah Mitchell (mum, 0412 334 556). Sister of Noah Mitchell (pat-036). Father David Mitchell (0421 887 334) for billing. Paediatric patient of Dr Kim. Asthma action plan on file — preventer review every 3 months.

Parent/guardian: Riya Kapoor (mum, 0438 221 789). Father Arjun (0438 221 790) works FIFO — only available for appointments every second week. Riya prefers phone calls, doesn't always see SMS. Paediatric patient of Dr Kim. 2-year-old, due for 24-month developmental check.

Parent/guardian: Mark Barnes (father, 0455 667 234). Mum Lisa (0455 667 235) for emergencies only — Mark has primary custody. Paediatric patient of Dr Kim. 12-year-old. Type 1 diabetes — insulin pump management. Quarterly HbA1c checks. School nurse coordinates with clinic for hypo management plan.

Uses walking frame. Son Keith (0413 778 445) drives her — only available before 2pm on weekdays. Needs ground floor consulting room (cannot manage stairs). Prefers morning appointments. Very anxious about falls — needs extra time getting in and out of chair. No email. Keith to be called for all appointment changes.

Wheelchair user since stroke in 2024. Wife Doris (0409 112 335) accompanies to all appointments and assists with communication — Harold has mild aphasia. Needs wheelchair-accessible room. Transport via community health bus on Wednesdays, private taxi other days. Morning appointments preferred — fatigues badly after lunch.

Rheumatoid arthritis — 6-weekly cycle: blood test (CRP + ESR + liver function) → rheumatologist review (external, Dr Webb at Westmead) → GP follow-up with Dr Chen 2 weeks later to adjust methotrexate if needed. Flares up in winter — may need extra urgent appointments May-August. Keep Friday afternoons free for her when possible.

COPD — quarterly cycle: lung function test (spirometry, must be morning when rested) → review with Dr Patel same week → chest physio referral if FEV1 declining. On Symbicort + Spiriva. Annual flu + pneumococcal vaccines. Oxygen concentrator at home for severe episodes. Wife manages medication schedule.

Mandarin speaker — speaks basic conversational English but needs Mandarin interpreter for discussing test results, treatment plans, or anything medical. Daughter Mei Liu (0467 334 890) translates for routine bookings and appointment reminders. For complex consultations, book TIS National interpreter (booking ref on file). Always allow extra 15 mins for interpreted appointments.

Phone contact ONLY — does not check email or SMS. Will not respond to text messages. Has stated clearly he will only answer phone calls. When calling, let it ring at least 8 times — he is slow to get to the phone. Best time to reach him: 10am-12pm.

SMS preferred for all communication. Gets very anxious with phone calls — has asked us not to call unless absolute emergency. Send written info ahead of appointments so she can prepare questions. Prefers text confirmations over phone confirmations. Anxiety management plan with Dr Patel.

Frequently misses appointments. Has been spoken to about no-shows multiple times. Triple reminder strategy in place: SMS 48 hours before + SMS 24 hours before + phone call morning of appointment. If no confirmation received by 4pm day before, call directly to confirm or rebook. Consider overbooking his slot as backup.

History of missed appointments — has improved recently after switching to early morning slots. Send email reminder 3 days before + SMS day before. If she doesn't confirm, her partner Sam (0432 998 446) can usually get her there. Has said she finds it hard to get away from work mid-day.

Mandarin speaker — limited English for medical terminology. Daughter Lily Chen (0412 775 330) interprets for all consultations. Lily finishes work at 1pm — appointments MUST be after 1:30pm so Lily can attend. Call Lily to arrange appointments, not Mrs Chen directly.

Wheelchair user since 2023. Requires ground-floor room with wheelchair access — Room 3 is upstairs with no lift, never book Room 3. Wife Fatima accompanies to all appointments and assists with communication. Prefers morning appointments (9:30-11:00am).
Also mum to Noah (pat-036) and Zoe (pat-037) — often books for the whole family. Reliable attendee, always on time.
